case_title: BAN BANG VS. RONALD ANTONIO GUERRERO II

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR MRS. BAN BANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RONALD ANTONIO GUERRERO IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A PAYMENT PLAN AGREEMENT IN COURT. $100 A MONTH FOR 15 MONTHS TO BE PAID VIA MONEY ORDER THE 16TH PAYMENT (ON THE 16TH MONTH) WILL BE FOR $50. PAYMENTS TO BE SENT BY US POST ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON DEC-15-2019. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED APR-19-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO II, RONALD ANTONIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANG, BAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRERO II, RONALD ANTONIO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-02-2019 - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO II, RONALD ANTONIO
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY BANG, BAN GUERRERO II, RONALD ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK. PLAINTIFF BAN BANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RONALD ANTONIO GUERRERO II IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO II, RONALD ANTONIO HEARING SET FOR NOV-21-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,550.00 FILED BY BANG, BAN AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO II, RONALD ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OEX HEARING IS OFF CALENDAR: PARTIES AGREED TO A PAYMENT PLAN.
